models.pipeline: A saved sequence of processing steps.
models.processNode: An individual operation within a pipeline.
models.availableNode: A catalog of available node types that can be added to the pipeline.

relationships: Pipeline contains many ProcessNodes ordered sequentially.

availableNodes.name: Image Input
availableNodes.description: Loads the selected image into the pipeline.

availableNodes.name: Gaussian Blur
availableNodes.description: Smooths the image to reduce noise.

availableNodes.name: Center Crop
availableNodes.description: Crops the image to a specified dimension.

availableNodes.name: PHANTAST
availableNodes.description: Calculates confluency using the Phase-Contrast algorithm.

nodes.name: CLAHE
nodes.helpText: Contrast Limited Adaptive Histogram Equalization (CLAHE) is an advanced image processing technique used to enhance contrast by dividing images into small tiles and applying local histogram equalization
